title: 菊花賞の後に・恥じて叱って、進め

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mejiro McQueen puts up a strong fight
for first, she loses her match with Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she can't simply hang her head in
shame. She bounces back from defeat, declaring
that she'll train harder and become even stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan expresses her gratitude for their
sincere match. But there is still more to come, and
she doesn't intend to lose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so... Mejiro McQueen sets her sights on her
next objective: the spring Tenno Sho. She is eager
to show the culmination of all her hard work.
